noise.text: Captain, we're hearing intermittent sounds from the aft compartment. Something small. Possibly alive. Possibly organized. Investigate personally, or send the cat?

cat-solves.text: The cat has returned, escorting the culprit: a loose water bottle with delusions of percussion. The cat has been awarded a medal. It ate the ribbon.

cat-defects.text: Update: the cat has joined the noise. There are now two things back there, and one of them purrs. We've decided to call it a party and monitor from a distance.

next-stop.text: Logged for investigation at next docking. The noise, hearing this, has grown self-conscious and stopped. Classic. They always stop when you make a plan.

escalates.text: No orders received, and the noise has unionized with the cargo. Their first demand: smoother roads. Honestly? Reasonable. Monitoring continues.
